overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia journeying through a scenic mountain meadow, encountering wildlife, and descending toward a coastal settlement. The clip features high-quality game engine rendering with overcast lighting and detailed natural environments transitioning from open fields to cliffside paths.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow with yellow wildflowers and mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass and yellow wildflowers toward the distant snow-capped mountains

entered.detail: towering snow-covered mountain range forming the distant backdrop
field of tall yellow wildflowers covering the grassy ground
dense pine and spruce trees covering the lower mountain slopes
small boulders and rock outcrops scattered in the grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide meadow filled with yellow wildflowers under an overcast sky. The character walks steadily forward through the tall grass toward a majestic snow-capped mountain range in the distance, with coniferous forests lining the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dirt path between rocky hills

events.description: herd of deer appears on the path ahead, standing in the trail
deer scatter and flee to the right as the character approaches

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding dirt trail through the hills, approaching the deer

notable_agents.action: herd of deer standing on the path, then fleeing to the right side into the bushes

entered.detail: steep rocky hillside rising up on the left side of the path
rocky terrain and boulders on the right side of the trail
narrow dirt path winding through the hilly terrain

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower dirt path between rocky hills. A herd of deer appears ahead on the trail, standing alert before scattering into the bushes as the character approaches. The open meadow gives way to more enclosed terrain with sparse vegetation.

events.description: character transitions from walking to running through the fields
terrain opens up to reveal the ocean and coastal cliffs ahead

agents.ego_description: jogging through colorful wildflower fields toward the coastline, increasing pace

entered.detail: meadow with mixed yellow and red wildflowers alongside the path
edge of the terrain where the land meets the sea becomes visible

segments.scene_description: The path opens back up into wide fields filled with colorful wildflowers. The character breaks into a run, heading toward the distant coastline where the terrain drops off to reveal ocean views. The mountains shift to the left as the perspective changes.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside path overlooking the ocean

events.description: entering shaded corridor between high rock faces, ambient light dims
path curves to reveal a coastal settlement with buildings and docks in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the narrow cliff path with steep drops to the ocean below

entered.detail: tall sheer rock face rising immediately to the left of the path
steep rocky cliff dropping down to the water on the right
expansive body of water visible through the gap in the cliffs
tall rock formations rising from the ocean surface

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes a narrow cliffside path squeezed between towering rock faces. The lighting dims in the shaded corridor as the character proceeds. Through the gap ahead, the ocean becomes visible with dramatic sea stacks rising from the water, and a distant coastal settlement comes into view.

events.description: approaching the waterfront settlement with visible wooden docks and sailing vessels

agents.ego_description: descending the trail toward the coastal village, with distant figures visible near the water

entered.detail: cluster of buildings and structures along the shoreline
ship with sails docked near the village harbor
wooden pier structures extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The path descends toward a coastal settlement nestled against the shore. The enclosing cliffs fall away to reveal a harbor with wooden docks and a sailing vessel at anchor. Distant villagers can be seen near the waterfront as the character approaches the end of the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a wide, overcast mountain meadow down toward a bustling coastal settlement. It begins with a steady walk through tall grass and yellow wildflowers toward a distant range of snow-capped peaks and coniferous forests. As the terrain narrows into a dirt path between rocky hills, a herd of alert deer scatters into the sparse vegetation before the scene opens back up into colorful fields where the character breaks into a run toward the distant ocean. The path then tightens into a shaded cliffside corridor squeezed between towering rock faces, where the lighting dims just before the gap reveals dramatic sea stacks rising from the water. Finally, the enclosing cliffs fall away as the trail descends to reveal a harbor with wooden docks, a sailing vessel at anchor, and villagers gathered along the waterfront.
